reject.title: Task Rejection
reject.warningDesc: After rejection, the task will be moved to the archive. The status of the task cannot be changed in the future.
reject.reasonPrompt: Please indicate the reason for rejection:
reject.placeholder: Tell us more about why you decided to reject the task...
